rationale: All medium-priority suggestions from the initial judge report have been applied: book titles corrected to standard Chinese versions ('人月神话', '启示录', '没有银弹：软件工程的本质与意外'). The translation remains technically accurate, natural, and preserves all MDX headings. No further medium/high-priority fixes are needed.

suggestionLog.reason: The standard Chinese title for Fred Brooks' 'The Mythical Man-Month' is '人月神话', not '神话中的人月'. This ensures readers can identify the book correctly.
suggestionLog.note: Applied exact replacement to selected MDX.

suggestionLog.reason: The standard Chinese title for Marty Cagan's 'Inspired' is '启示录', not '灵感'. Using the correct title improves accuracy for readers seeking the book.
suggestionLog.note: Applied exact replacement to selected MDX.

suggestionLog.match: 没有银弹：软件工程的本质与偶然
suggestionLog.replacement: 没有银弹：软件工程的本质与意外
suggestionLog.reason: The original English subtitle is 'Essence and Accidents of Software Engineering'. 'Accidents' refers to accidental difficulties, better translated as '意外' rather than '偶然' (coincidence).
suggestionLog.note: Applied exact replacement to selected MDX.
